description: Repair normalize_contacts so it returns contacts sorted by id with the exact keys id, name, email, and active. Accept email from email, email_address, or contact.email. Trim names and emails, title-case names, lowercase emails, and use explicit active tokens where 'active', 'enabled', 'yes', 'true', '1', and True are active while 'inactive', 'disabled', 'no', 'false', '0', False, missing, blank, or unknown tokens are inactive. Merge duplicate ids by choosing each nonblank name and email field from the greatest source priority first (manual > crm > import > missing/other), then greatest numeric updated_at timestamp, then later input order; blank name/email fields do not replace existing nonblank fields. Choose active by the same priority, timestamp, and input-order rule. Rows with status deleted/remove or deleted set to True are tombstones; if the winning active/status row for an id is a tombstone, omit that contact.
